fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code that you can select.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies what type of amount to calculate - price or cost.

fields.name: Details
fields.tooltip: Specifies the count of detailed price calculation setup records.

fields.name: Implementation
fields.tooltip: The name of the implementation codeunit or extension that will do the price calculation.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the implementation codeunit is enabled.

fields.name: Default
fields.tooltip: Specifies if this is the default implementation. You cannot remove the Default check mark, instead pick another record for the same calculation method to become the default implementation.
